classification.summary: Vimeo FY26 revenue compensation plan with calculators for 9 roles (AE, AEAM Hybrid, AM, CSM, ISR, Partner-Channel, RM, SDR, SE) covering tiered commission rates, retention draws, multi-year deal bonuses, and pass-up incentives

rules.description: Universal tiered acceleration rate table applied to all roles. Commission rate multiplier increases as attainment rises through 5 tiers.

Multi-year deal acceleration for AEs (and AEAM Hybrids, ISRs with MY deals). Incremental ARR on multi-year deals earns a BCR multiplier based on contract duration. Applied as bonus = ARR × BCR × multiplier.
AE renewal multi-year deal bonus paid as a flat 0.50% rate on prior ARR for renewal multi-year deals.
AE (Named/Ent/MM and SMB-Media) plan is 100% Net New Bookings, single component, annual timing.

rawSnapshot.evidence: AE | Named/Ent/MM | Annual | Net New Bookings | 1; AE | SMB - Media | Annual | Net New Bookings | 1

rules.description: AEAM Hybrid (non-OTT) compensation split: 80% NNB+Expansion / 20% Retention, annual timing.

rawSnapshot.evidence: AE/AM | non-OTT | Annual | Net New Bookings+Expansion | 0.8 | Retention | 0.2

rules.description: AEAM Hybrid (OTT) compensation split: 60% NNB+Expansion / 40% Retention, annual timing.

rawSnapshot.evidence: AE/AM | OTT | Annual | Net New Bookings+Expansion | 0.6 | Retention | 0.4

rules.description: Account Manager (non-OTT) compensation split: 80% Expansion / 20% Retention, annual timing.
Account Manager (OTT) compensation split: 60% Expansion / 40% Retention, annual timing.
ISR compensation split: 60% Closed Won Opps / 40% Net New Bookings, quarterly timing.

rawSnapshot.evidence: ISR | All | Quarterly | Closed Won | 0.6 | Net New Bookings | 0.4

rules.description: SDR compensation split: 80% SQOs / 20% Regional Net New Bookings. SQOs are quarterly, Bookings are annual.

rawSnapshot.evidence: SDR | All | Quarterly | SQOs | 0.8 | Net New Bookings | 0.2

rules.description: Renewal Manager compensation split: 80% Retention / 20% Expansion, annual timing.
Customer Success Manager compensation split: 80% Retention / 20% Expansion, annual timing. Regional crediting rather than rep-based.

rawSnapshot.evidence: CSM | All | Annual | Retention | 0.8 | Expansion | 0.2 | Regional crediting rather than rep-based

rules.description: Channel Sales (Strategic) compensation split: 100% Sourced, annual timing.

rawSnapshot.evidence: Channel | Strategic | Annual | Sourced | 1 | Fulfilled | n/a

rules.description: Channel Sales (R&D) compensation split: 40% Sourced / 60% Fulfilled, annual timing.
Channel Sales (Regional 60/40) compensation split: 60% Sourced / 40% Fulfilled, annual timing.
Channel Sales (Regional 50/50) compensation split: 50% Sourced / 50% Fulfilled, annual timing.
Solutions Engineer compensation: 100% Regional Bookings, annual timing.

Retention payout uses a floor rate calculated as (2 × Target Rate − 1). Below the floor, payout is 0%. At the floor, payout starts at 50%. Payout scales linearly from 50% at floor to 100% at target to 150% at ceiling. Applies to AM, AEAM Hybrid, RM, and CSM retention components.
Retention payout is capped at 150% of the retention variable when the actual retention rate meets or exceeds 100%. The formula hard-codes 1.5 as the maximum payout multiplier.

Retention component has a decelerator: below the floor rate (2×Target−1), payout drops to zero. Between floor and target, payout scales from 50% to 100% (sub-linear earning). This creates a decelerator zone where reps earn less than proportional commission.

CSM and RM retention component pays 75% quarterly draw in Q1–Q3 (75% of quarterly retention variable = 75% × RetentionVariable/4). Q4 is a year-end true-up: Annual Retention Payout minus 3 quarterly draws.
AEAM Hybrid and AM retention component pays 50% quarterly draw in Q1–Q3 (50% of quarterly retention variable). Q4 is a year-end true-up: Annual Retention Payout minus 3 quarterly draws.

rawSnapshot.evidence: Q1–Q3 Quarterly Draw (50% × qtr var) = 5625; Q4 Year-End True-Up = Annual payout − 3 draws

rules.description: January 2026 paid as a flat draw equal to 1/12th of annual vOTE for all roles. February paid as offline estimated commission. March must include true-up.

rawSnapshot.evidence: January 2026 paid as flat Draw (1/12th annual vOTE) and February paid as offline Estimated Commission. March must true-up.

rules.description: Services bookings earn 50% of the role's primary BCR (base commission rate). Applies to all roles. For RM/CSM the BCR basis is Expansion BCR. For Channel, there are two eligible BCRs (Sourced and Fulfilled).

parameters.notes: RM/CSM use Expansion BCR; Channel has two eligible BCRs (Sourced/Fulfilled)

rawSnapshot.evidence: 50% BCR applies to all Services. Note: RM/CSM to use Expansion and Channel has two eligible BCRs (Sourced/Fulfilled)

rules.description: AE Net New Bookings commission rate table. BCR = OTC / NNB Quota. Tiered payout across 5 tiers with the universal acceleration multipliers applied to the BCR.
AEAM Hybrid NNB+Expansion commission rate table. BCR = C1 Variable / C1 Quota. Weighted OTC is 80% (non-OTT) or 60% (OTT). Tiered across 5 universal tiers.
Account Manager Expansion component commission rate table. BCR = Expansion Variable / Expansion Quota. Weighted OTC is 80% (non-OTT) or 60% (OTT). Tiered across 5 universal tiers.

Account Manager Retention component uses scaled retention payout. Payout = Retention Payout % × Retention Variable. Floor = 2×Target−1. Scales 50% at floor to 150% at/above 100%. Non-OTT weight: 20%, OTT weight: 40%.
CSM Retention component (80% of OTC) uses scaled retention payout identical to RM. Floor = 2×Target−1. Scales 0%→50%→100%→150%.
CSM Expansion component (20% of OTC) uses the universal 5-tier acceleration table. BCR = Expansion Variable / Expansion Quota.

rawSnapshot.evidence: G23: =IF(G11>=1,C9*G10*1,C9*G11*G10*1); G24-G27 follow tiered pattern with 1.25/1.5/2/2.25 multipliers

rules.description: ISR Closed Won Opps component (60% of quarterly OTC). BCR = $ per opp = Quarterly C1 Variable / Quarterly C1 Quota. Tiered across 5 universal tiers.

parameters.bcr_formula: Quarterly C1 Variable / Quarterly C1 Quota

rules.description: ISR Net New Bookings component (40% of quarterly OTC). BCR = Quarterly C2 Variable / Quarterly NNB Quota. Tiered across 5 universal tiers.

parameters.bcr_formula: Quarterly C2 Variable / Quarterly NNB Quota

rules.description: ISR Pass-Up Incentive: $50 flat rate per opportunity passed to an AE, regardless of outcome.
ISR Pass-Up Incentive: 2% of closed deal value for passed-up opportunities that result in a closed won deal.

parameters.basis: Closed deal value of passed-up opportunity

rawSnapshot.evidence: Closed Won Bonus (2% of deal value)

rules.description: Partner-Channel Sourced NNB component. Weight varies by segment (40%–100%). BCR = C1 Weighted OTC / Sourced Quota. Tiered across 5 universal tiers.

parameters.bcr_formula: C1 Weighted OTC / Sourced Bookings Quota

rules.description: Partner-Channel Fulfilled NNB component. Weight = 1 − Sourced weight. BCR = C2 Weighted OTC / Fulfilled Quota. Tiered across 5 universal tiers.

parameters.bcr_formula: C2 Weighted OTC / Fulfilled Bookings Quota

rules.description: Renewal Manager Retention component (80% of OTC) uses scaled retention payout. Identical to CSM retention. Floor = 2×Target−1. Scales 0%→50%→100%→150%.
Renewal Manager Expansion component (20% of OTC) uses the universal 5-tier acceleration table. BCR = Expansion Variable / Expansion Quota.
SDR SQO component (80% of OTC). Quarterly. BCR = $ per SQO = Quarterly C1 Variable / Quarterly SQO Quota. Tiered across 5 universal tiers.

parameters.bcr_formula: Quarterly C1 Variable / Quarterly SQO Quota

rules.description: SDR Regional Net New Bookings component (20% of OTC). Annual. BCR = C2 Variable / Annual Bookings Quota. Tiered across 5 universal tiers.
SE Regional Net New Bookings (100% of OTC). Annual. BCR = OTC / Bookings Quota. Tiered across 5 universal tiers.
Services bookings are excluded from Net New Bookings quota credit. Services are paid separately at 50% of BCR as an additional incentive.

parameters.condition: Services bookings excluded from NNB credit

rawSnapshot.evidence: Services excl from NNB (noted for AE, SE roles)

rules.description: Channel Sales credit assignment changed from rep-based to region-based for FY26.
CSM crediting changed from rep-based to regional crediting for FY26.
BCR/Quota changes must have an option between fixed and prorated when a goal changes mid-period.

rawSnapshot.evidence: Requirement for BCR to have an option between fixed/prorated when a goal changes

rules.description: ISR/SDR Manager plan: 25% Closed Won Opps (rollup from ISRs), 25% Net New Bookings (rollup from ISRs), 50% SQOs (rollup from SDRs). Quarterly timing.

components.name: Closed Won Opps
components.credit_source: Rollup of ISRs reporting to them

components.name: Net New Bookings
components.credit_source: Rollup of ISRs reporting to them

components.name: SQOs
components.credit_source: Rollup of SDRs reporting to them

rawSnapshot.evidence: ISR/SDR Manager | All | Quarterly | Closed Won Opps | 0.25 | Net New Bookings | 0.25 | Component 3: SQOs 50%

rules.description: CSM/SE Manager plan: 75% Retention (rollup from CSMs), 12.5% Expansion (region-based), 12.5% Regional Bookings (region-based). Annual timing.

components.name: Retention
components.credit_source: Rollup of CSMs reporting to them

rawSnapshot.evidence: CSM/SE Manager | All | Annual | Retention | 0.75 | Expansion | 0.125 | Component 3: Regional Bookings 12.5%

rules.description: Multi-year deal BCR multipliers apply to AE, AM, AE/AM, and ISR roles. The BCR percentage is based on the number of years per the multi-year rate table.

rawSnapshot.evidence: AE, AM, AE/AM, ISR | All | Multi Year | > vOTE | % of BCR based # of year per rate table

rules.description: All roles: attainment between 100%–125% earns commission at 1.25× the base commission rate (25% acceleration above quota).
All roles: attainment between 125%–150% earns commission at 1.50× the base commission rate.
All roles: attainment between 150%–200% earns commission at 2.00× the base commission rate.
All roles: attainment above 200% earns commission at 2.25× the base commission rate. No cap on attainment — uncapped above 200%.
Channel roles earn services commission at 50% of both the Sourced BCR and Fulfilled BCR, applied to their respective services bookings.

rawSnapshot.evidence: Sourced Services BCR (%): 0.05625; Fulfilled Services BCR (%): 0.006818

rules.description: SE Services commission at 50% of the primary bookings BCR.

insights: 1. The 200%+ tier has no upper cap, meaning commission earning potential is technically uncapped above 200% attainment for all tiered components. However, retention components are capped at 150% payout. 2. ISR/SDR Manager and CSM/SE Manager calculator sheets are not present — the Plan Summary notes these are 'included only if time allows.' 3. The AEAM Hybrid retention draw rate (50%) differs from the CSM/RM retention draw rate (75%) — this is an important distinction for implementation. 4. The retention scaling formula (0% below floor → 50% at floor → 150% at ceiling) creates a non-linear payout curve that differs from the tiered structure used for other components. 5. Multi-year deal bonuses for ISRs use the C2 (NNB) BCR as the basis, not C1. 6. January 2026 flat draw and February estimated commission require manual/offline handling with a March true-up — this is a transitional implementation detail. 7. The Plan Summary references 'GA Tables' (01 through 06) which likely correspond to rate tables in the CaptivateIQ/compensation system — cross-referencing with CIQ configuration would confirm alignment. 8. BCR proration option (fixed vs. prorated on goal change) is a system configuration requirement, not a formula-level rule. 9. ASC 606 reporting and commission statement replication are operational requirements, not compensation rules per se.
